metadata.title: Map of Content Generator
metadata.description: Map of Content Generator Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show the ribbon button (needs restart)
ast.target: 是否显示功能区按钮（需要重启）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set directory to generate maps of content into
ast.target: 设置用于生成内容地图的目录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to include bases in the view
ast.target: 是否在视图中包含基础地图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to include itself in the view
ast.target: 是否在视图中包含自身

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This only affects folders under the base map of contents folder but as of right now it could delete the map of content folder itself.
ast.target: 这仅影响基础内容地图文件夹下的文件夹，但目前它可能会删除内容地图文件夹本身。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to generate/update the map of contents on load
ast.target: 是否在加载时生成/更新内容地图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to update the map of contents when they're generated.
ast.target: 是否在生成时更新内容地图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to update the bases that do not map to a folder in the vault.
ast.target: 是否更新那些未映射到保险库中文件夹的基础地图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to make a special map of content that links to the other maps of contents
ast.target: 是否创建一个特殊的内容地图，链接到其他内容地图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the file to be used as root (if applicable)
ast.target: 用作根目录的文件名（如适用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to remove bases in the map of content folder that do not match to other folders.
ast.target: 是否移除内容地图文件夹中不匹配其他文件夹的基础地图。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable ribbon button
ast.target: 启用功能区按钮

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Map of content base directory
ast.target: 内容地图基础目录

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude all bases
ast.target: 排除所有基础地图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude self
ast.target: 排除自身

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delete empty folders after generation
ast.target: 生成后删除空文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Generate on startup
ast.target: 启动时生成

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Update templates on generation
ast.target: 生成时更新模板

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Ignore extras during update
ast.target: 更新时忽略额外项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Generate root map of content
ast.target: 生成根内容地图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Root map of content name
ast.target: 根内容地图名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove extra bases
ast.target: 移除额外的基础地图

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the folder to be used as a base
ast.target: 输入要用作基础的文件夹

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Root map name
ast.target: 根地图名称
